name: Drawer Drop
description: Unplaced repository dragged from bottom drawer onto the map

scenarios.description: Unplaced repository dragged from drawer onto map

template.summary: Placed {{repository.id}} from unplaced drawer onto collection {{collection.id}}

events.collection-map.drawer-drop: Dragged {{repository.id}} from unplaced drawer at ({{grid.x}}, {{grid.y}}) in collection {{collection.id}}
events.collection-map.project-moved: Positioned {{repository.id}} (is.new.repo={{is.new.repo}}, is.first.placement={{is.first.placement}}) in region {{region.id}} at ({{grid.x}}, {{grid.y}}) in collection {{collection.id}}
events.collection-map.position-saved: Saved position for {{repository.id}} in region {{region.id}} (region.changed={{region.changed}}) at ({{grid.x}}, {{grid.y}}) in collection {{collection.id}}
